word: G737 - ἄρτι - árti - ar'-tee - This day

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄρτι

- Transliteration: Arti

- Phonetic: ar'-tee

- Definition:

1. just now, this moment

2. now at this time, at this very time, this moment

- Origin: from a derivative of G142 (cf G740) through the idea of suspension

- TDNT entry: 22:26,7

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from a derivative of G142 (compare G740) through the idea of suspension; just now: - this day (hour) hence [-forth] here [-after] hither [-to] (even) now (this) present.
